name: fieldpulse-lite
description: Local-first field logging app with ClickUp sync

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix electron
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build && npm run desktop:start
